criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on popular app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, App Annie

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's interface and overall user experience.

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: Accuracy, depth, and relevance of the educational content provided.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Effectiveness and innovation in the use of AI for educational purposes.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance across different platforms and devices.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Metrics such as daily active users, session duration, and retention rates.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique features and functionalities that set the app apart from competitors.

criteria.name: Security and Privacy
criteria.description: Measures taken to ensure user data security and privacy.

criteria.name: Monetization Strategy
criteria.description: How the app generates revenue, such as through subscriptions, in-app purchases, or ads.
